summary: Every legal input is a fixed three-field date of at most thirteen characters, so the source domain provides no scalable workload dimension.

workload_bound.source_constraint: date is a valid Day Month Year value whose four-digit year ranges from 1900 through 2100

replacement_checks.evidence: Parsing touches at most thirteen characters, performs one lookup in a fixed twelve-month table, and emits ten characters.
The certificate regression checks every valid Gregorian date from 1900-01-01 through 2100-12-31 with its proper ordinal suffix.
